name: Oceanbridge Co., Ltd
summary: Oceanbridge Co., Ltd manufactures and sells semiconductor materials and equipment. It also operates in chemical business. The company's products include precursors for semiconductor devices, gases, chemical and slurry supply systems, N2 side storage equipment, ion implant parts, O-rings, and boards, as well as through silicon via technology. It serves the semiconductor industry. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Anseong-si, South Korea.
